title: No Bind Restrictions
description: A client-side tool to give you more control over your keybinds and actions!
body:
🚀 No Bind Restrictions

Chain multiple Minecraft actions into a single keybind.

No Bind Restrictions is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that allows players to create customizable action chains and execute them with a single key press. Instead of juggling multiple keybinds or external macros, this mod lets you combine common in-game actions directly inside Minecraft.

It is designed for flexibility, performance, and ease of use while remaining fully optional and configurable.

✨ Features

🔹 Action Chains
Create unlimited custom chains that combine multiple actions into one keybind. The only limitation is your system’s RAM.

🔹 Built-in Configuration (Mod Menu)
Easily manage chains from the in-game configuration screen.
You can:

Enable or disable the mod anytime

Create, edit, and delete chains

Bind chains to any key

Adjust delays and order of execution

🔹 Supported Actions

Jump

Sneak

Attack / Break Block (Left Click)

Use Item (Right Click)

Hotbar Slot Switching

Custom Delay between actions

🔹 Fully Client-Side
The mod does not modify server behavior and works without installing anything on the server.

🔹 Performance-Focused
Action execution is designed to be lightweight and stable during gameplay.

🔹 Server Compatibility
The mod can be toggled on or off at any time.
This allows players to disable it on servers that restrict macro-like behavior.

⚠️ Disclaimer

Some servers may have rules against macros or automated input.
This mod includes an easy toggle to disable all functionality.
Always follow the rules of the servers you play on.

🛠️ Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.11

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

Mod Menu 

Cloth Config API

🎯 Why use No Bind Restrictions?

Many players rely on external macro tools to perform chained inputs. This mod provides a clean, in-game, open-source alternative that integrates directly with Minecraft while remaining customizable and transparent.

📦 Open Source

The full source code is available on GitHub.
Feel free to contribute, suggest features, or report issues!
